results.title: Unprecedented Day in Bengal Politics: Kalyan Banerjee Suspended from Lok Sabha, Kunal Ghosh from Assembly
results.description: Last Updated on July 23, 2026 1:04 am by INDIAN AWAAZ By Aafreen Hussain West Bengal witnessed an extraordinary day of political turmoil on Tuesday as two high-profile Trinamool Congress leaders faced suspension from two different legislatures within hours of each other, throwing the party into fresh controversy. Senior Trinamool MP Kalyan Banerjee was suspended [...]
